allow: Bash(git add . && git commit -m "Phase 1: scaffold — Discord bot, guard engine, orchestrator, Docker stack" && git push -u origin main)
Bash(git add configs/channels.json && git commit -m "Add Discord channel IDs" && git push)
Bash(git rm --cached .claude/settings.local.json && git add .gitignore && git commit -m "Remove settings.local.json from tracking, add to .gitignore" && git push)
Bash(git add discord-bot/bot.py guard-engine/guards.py docker-compose.yml && git commit -m "fix: slash command sync, guard body parsing, remove compose version" && git push)
